faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Valley Stream?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day wasp removal services throughout Valley Stream in most cases. Our team typically responds within 2-4 hours of your call and can safely eliminate wasp nests during a single visit, depending on nest size and location.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 wasp removal price include?
faqs.answer: Our pricing covers complete inspection, safe nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and disposal of the nest. The final cost depends on nest size, location accessibility (ground level vs. high eaves), and the wasp species involved.

faqs.question: When is wasp season most active in Valley Stream?
faqs.answer: Wasp activity peaks in Valley Stream from late spring through early fall (May-October), with wasps becoming most aggressive in late summer when colonies reach maximum size. Early detection and removal during spring can prevent larger infestations later in the season.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for pets and children in my Valley Stream home?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted treatments that are safe for your family and pets once dried. Our technicians take extensive precautions during removal, and we advise keeping children and pets indoors during the treatment process, typically allowing return to the area within 2-3 hours.
